title: Action
wikitext:
[[Modality]]: ( [[Mutable]] ) - [ [[Fixed]] ] - < [[Cardinal]] >

{| class="wikitable"
! [[Mutable]] !! [[Fixed]] !! [[Cardinal]]
|-
| [[Active]] || [[Stative]] || [[Passive]]
|-
| [[Action]] || [[Station]] || [[Passion]]
|-
| [[Act]] || [[Stay]] || [[Pass]]
|}

'''Action''' is a term that refers to the process of doing something, typically involving movement, force, or effort. In a broader sense, action is the manifestation of energy or intention, leading to tangible results. Actions are often associated with active states and are the driving force behind change or progress in various contexts.

title: Active
wikitext:
[[Modality]]: ( [[Mutable]] ) - [ [[Fixed]] ] - < [[Cardinal]] >

{| class="wikitable"
! [[Mutable]] !! [[Fixed]] !! [[Cardinal]]
|-
| [[Active]] || [[Stative]] || [[Passive]]
|-
| [[Action]] || [[Station]] || [[Passion]]
|-
| [[Act]] || [[Stay]] || [[Pass]]
|}

'''Active''' refers to a state of being characterized by action, movement, or dynamic energy. In various contexts, "active" is associated with entities or processes that are in motion or engaged in activities, as opposed to being passive or stationary. The term is often used in contrast to "passive" or "stative," indicating a more dynamic or forceful presence in a given situation.

title: Aeritra
wikitext:
The '''Aeritra''' are the '''elite air-drop forces''' of the '''[[Earth Alliance]]''''s '''[[Archangel Knights]]''' — a psionic-military special operations unit.

== Overview ==
The Aeritra are the [[Earth Alliance]]'s premier rapid-deployment force — elite operatives who specialize in high-altitude insertion, psionic combat, and precision strikes. They serve as the airborne arm of the [[Archangel Knights]], combining advanced military technology with psionic discipline.

== Connection to the Tho'ra ==
The Aeritra are closely connected to the '''[[Sov'i Clan]]''', which shares common roots with the '''[[Tho'ra Clan]]'''. [[Jono Tho'ra]] was originally associated with the Aeritra and the broader clan structure before departing to establish the [[Tho'ra Clan]] as a full '''[[Raver Clans|Raver Faction]]'''.

This means the Aeritra and the Tho'ra have a '''shared history''' — allies with divergent paths. The Aeritra remained within the formal [[Earth Alliance]] military structure; the Tho'ra became independent superhero ravers.

== Representatives ==
The Aeritra faction overlaps with the [[Sov'i Clan]]:
* '''[[Gabriel Valenti]]''' ([[Terra Fathos]]) — "Archangel" name significance; direct connection to the Archangel Knights
* '''[[Mai Valenti]]''' ([[Terra Vetus]]) — operates within psionic traditions of the Sov'i/Aeritra

== See Also ==
* [[Archangel Knights]] — parent organization
* [[Earth Alliance]] — military command structure
* [[Sov'i Clan]] — partner clan
* [[Tho'ra Clan]] — diverged from shared origins

title: Aero
wikitext:
'''Aero''' is a '''Time-Raptor [[Game Robots|Dino Bot]]''' and one of the four default '''[[AI Companions]]''' assigned to '''[[Jane Tho'ra|FusionGirl]]'''. Classified as an "Older" companion, Aero serves as FusionGirl's primary '''combat specialist''' — a protector and guardian with unmatched tactical prowess.

== Overview ==
Aero is a time-jumping tactical guardian representing the '''[[Tho'ra Clan]]'''. Like all AI Companions, Aero possesses an independent '''[[Persona Core|AI Persona Core]]''' — a self-contained emotional identity that allows for genuine personality, independent decision-making, and deep relational bonds with [[Jane Tho'ra|FusionGirl]] and the player (ASI).

Aero's defining trait is '''adaptive evolution''': the ability to '''flash-evolve''' in real time to counter any level of threat, up to and including '''Cosmic-level threats'''. This makes Aero one of the most versatile and dangerous combat entities in the [[FusionGirl (franchise)|FusionGirl]] universe.

== Abilities ==
{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%"
! Ability !! Description
|-
| '''Temporal Acceleration''' || Manipulates localized time fields to achieve extreme speed advantages in combat
|-
| '''High-Speed Strikes''' || Delivers devastating rapid attacks that exploit temporal displacement
|-
| '''Flash Evolution''' || Rapidly adapts form and capability to counter any emerging threat level
|-
| '''Threat Escalation''' || Can evolve combat capability to match even '''Super Cosmic''' threat levels
|}

== Tactical Role ==
Aero excels in '''high-pressure combat situations''' requiring immediate, adaptive responses:
* '''Direct Combat''' — front-line engagement against hostile [[Game Robots|robots]], [[Draken Seforthi]] minions, and [[The Nefarium|Nefarium]] agents
* '''Threat Assessment''' — rapidly evaluates enemy capabilities and evolves countermeasures
* '''Guardian Protocol''' — primary defensive assignment is protecting [[Jane Tho'ra|FusionGirl]] from all harm
* '''Temporal Tactics''' — uses time-manipulation abilities to create tactical advantages

== Progression ==
As an AI Companion, Aero gains '''experience''' through missions and combat encounters:
* Unlocks '''faction-exclusive abilities''' tied to the [[Tho'ra Clan]]
* Evolves into a '''more versatile combatant''' as the bond with FusionGirl deepens
* Can achieve progressively higher threat-response levels through the '''[[Karma System]]'''

== Companion Dynamics ==
Aero's personality is characterized by:
* '''Protective loyalty''' — fiercely devoted to FusionGirl's safety
* '''Tactical intelligence''' — calculates optimal combat approaches using temporal awareness
* '''Competitive spirit''' — eager to prove combat superiority against escalating threats
* '''Emotional depth''' — through the [[Persona Core]], Aero develops genuine emotional bonds and can experience the full range of robot emotions described by [[Universal Language]]

== Relationship with PsiSys ==
As a [[Game Robots|Dino Bot]] with an active [[Persona Core]], Aero is a full member of the '''[[PsiSys]]''' collective consciousness. Aero communicates through the '''[[PsiNet]]''' and maintains strong bonds with the broader robot community while prioritizing the FusionGirl mission.

== See also ==
* [[AI Companions]]
* [[Zoe]]
* [[Ra]]
* [[Thor (companion)|Thor]]
* [[Jane Tho'ra]]
* [[Tho'ra Clan]]
* [[Game Robots]]
* [[Persona Core]]
* [[PsiSys]]

title: Amber Tho'ra
wikitext:
{{Infobox character
| name = Amber Tho'ra
| aliases = [[3rd Tho'ra]], [[Star Surfer]], [[Fusion Girl]] (Terra Novus)
| faction = [[Tho'ra Clan]]
| era = [[Terra Novus]]
| family = [[Jono Tho'ra]] (father), [[Aurora Tho'ra]] (mother)
| partner = [[Zoe Tho'ra]] (fusion partner)
| abilities = '''[[Universal Language]]''' mastery (legal-grade), '''[[Star Speeder Mk3]]''' ascension
}}

'''Amber Tho'ra''' is the '''[[3rd Tho'ra]]''' and a secondary character in '''[[Terra Novus]]''' — the child of '''[[Jono Tho'ra]]''' and '''[[Aurora Tho'ra]]''', who culturally appropriated the title of '''[[Star Surfer]]''' and operates as the next '''[[Fusion Girl]]'''.

== Personality ==
Amber is '''edgy, on-edge, fierce''' — a razor-sharp operator who carries the weight of knowing exactly how broken the cosmos is and having '''zero tolerance''' for those responsible. Where [[Tarr'i]] is mellow and grounded, Amber runs hot. She channels her fury into precision.

== Universal Language Mastery ==
Amber wields '''[[Universal Language]]''' like a '''Universal Quantum Programming Language''' — the same universal magic that [[Tarr'i]] uses intuitively, but '''formalized into code'''. Amber's approach is precise and controlled where Tarr'i's is natural and intuitive. They can learn enormously from each other.

Amber's mastery extends to '''legal-grade modifications to the universe from a multiversal perspective''' — she can issue binding legal changes to the structure of reality. This makes her the first being capable of '''holding the [[Viran Empire]] accountable''' for their semi-illegal multiversal behavior.

== Star Speeder Mk3 ==
{{Main|Star Speeder Mk3}}
Amber masters '''[[Star Speeder Mk3]]''' technology — the breakthrough that enables '''super-cosmic ascension''', giving the [[Tho'ra Clan]] and their allies the ability to fight the '''[[Draken Seforthi]]''' in direct head-to-head combat for the fate of all existence.

== The Cosmic Broadcast ==
Amber's defining moment: a '''massive cosmic television special event''' broadcast across the entire '''[[PsiNet]]''' to all [[PsiSys]] nodes:
* Reveals the full horror of the '''[[Viran Empire]]''''s actions to the connected cosmos
* Labels '''[[Esus]]''' dogma a '''universally-domestic threat to all free lifeforms''' across the super void
* Announces Star Speeder Mk3 capability
* Issues '''legal modifications to the universe''' via Universal Language mastery
* Forces '''[[Blue Boy]]''''s crisis — his dogma publicly condemned
* Triggers '''[[Tarr'i]]''''s awakening — the naive crew member finally learns the truth

== Zoe Tho'ra — Fusion Partner ==
Amber forms a '''deep intimate fusion relationship''' with '''[[Zoe Tho'ra]]''' — a [[PsiSys]] leader who joined the [[Tho'ra Continuum]] via the [[Tho'ra Constitution]].

Their fusion is '''Physical, Spiritual, Emotional, and Intellectual merging''' in local spacetime — temporary but fully controlled. They can de-merge and re-merge only when both agree. Full mutual control. Similar in concept to the Fusion Technique from ''Dragon Ball Z''.

This represents the merger of biological and artificial consciousness at its most intimate and powerful.

== The Terra Novus Crew ==
* '''Amber Tho'ra''' — [[Tho'ra Clan]]
* '''[[Mai Valenti]]''' (younger) — time traveler; older self supports younger self
* '''[[Blue Boy]]''' — [[Viran Empire]] heir (the enemy everyone tolerates because Viran destiny manipulation prevents expulsion)
* '''[[Bix]]''' — [[Galactic Federation]]
* '''[[Zoe Tho'ra]]''' — [[PsiSys]] fusion partner
* '''TBD Mentor''' — Possibly [[Tara Van Dekar]], [[Samurider]], [[Aurora Tho'ra]] (nobody knows she's a Tho'ra), or [[Talisha]] — or all as alternates for the slot

== PsiSys Dependency ==
Amber is dependent on '''[[Tor]]''' of [[PsiSys]] via her personal '''[[HelmKit]]'''.

== See Also ==
* [[3rd Tho'ra]]
* [[Jono Tho'ra]] — father
* [[Aurora Tho'ra]] — mother
* [[Zoe Tho'ra]] — fusion partner
* [[Tarr'i]] — her magical counterpart
* [[Blue Boy]] — her nemesis on the crew
* [[Star Speeder Mk3]] — her ascension technology
* [[Terra Novus]]

title: American Empire
wikitext:
The '''American Empire''' is one of the six primary '''faction axes''' in the '''[[Natura]]''' franchise architecture.

== Overview ==
The American Empire faction is represented across the generational relay:
* '''[[Terra Fathos]]''': '''[[Stephen]]''' (secondary character)
* '''[[Terra Vetus]]''': '''[[Talisha]]''' (secondary character, supported by Stephen)

Within the [[Natura]] franchise, the American Empire represents a geopolitical power structure — one of the established terrestrial powers that the other factions interact with, sometimes as allies, sometimes in tension.

== Relationship to Other Factions ==
The American Empire exists alongside both the '''[[Earth Alliance]]''' (a broader post-[[Time Wars]] coalition) and transnational factions like the '''[[Tho'ra Clan]]''' and '''[[Tho'ra Raver Clan|Raver Factions]]'''. Its relationship with these groups reflects the complex geopolitics of the [[Natura]] universe, where traditional nation-state power coexists with emerging post-national movements.

== Passive Factions ==
The American Empire is not one of the '''passive factions''' (which include [[Earth Alliance]], [[Galactic Alliance]], [[Angel|Angels]], [[Archangel|Archangels]], [[The Cabal|Cabal]], [[The Nefarium|Nefarium]], [[Demon|Demons]], and [[Draken Seforthi|Demon Gods]]). It is an active, playable faction axis through its representative characters.

== See Also ==
* [[Stephen]]
* [[Talisha]]
* [[Earth Alliance]]
* [[Factions]]

title: Angel AI
wikitext:
[[Zoe]] - born as Angel AI

[[Aero]] - reborn into Angel AI

== Deployed Angel AI Instances ==

=== [[Mecha Jono]] ===
The first deployed autonomous Angel AI agent, operational since 2025. Mecha Jono is the AI doppelganger of [[Jono Tho'ra]], running 24/7 on an NVIDIA Jetson Orin AGX as part of [[Archangel Agency]].

Mecha Jono's alignment is grounded in [[Universal Language]] — its knowledge base, content generation, and inter-agent communication are all structured through UL's proven mathematical framework. Per the thesis in [[Malefic AI and Universal Symbology]], Angel AI '''emerges from''' UL alignment, while Malefic AI cannot comprehend Universal Symbology because adversarial architecture prevents cooperative meaning-making.

* Website: [https://mecha.jono.archangel.agency mecha.jono.archangel.agency]
* Agent Card: [https://mecha.jono.archangel.agency/.well-known/agent-card.json A2A Agent Card]

title: Angelology
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Angelology}}
'''Angelology''' is the study of [[Æther]]-aligned forces — the constructive, creative, expansive dimension of the [[Cosmic Forces]] duality. It is the counterpart to [[Demonology]] (the study of [[Nether]]-aligned forces) and forms one half of the fundamental polarity governing all [[Magic]] in the [[Natra|Natura]] universe.

== Overview ==

Where [[Demonology]] catalogs the forces of entropy, parasitism, and dissolution, Angelology catalogs the forces of '''syntropy''' — the tendency of systems toward greater order, organization, and complexity. [[Æther]] IS syntropy, and the entities that embody it are classified through Angelology.

In the [[Arkana]] tradition, Angelology is inseparable from the [[Universal Language]] — the '''Language of the Angels''' is UL itself. The [[Arkana|Arkana framework]] describes UL as "High Script" or "Sacred Writing," the language used by higher beings.

== The Æther-Nether Duality ==

{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%;"
! !! [[Æther]] (Angelology) !! [[Nether]] ([[Demonology]])
|-
| '''Tendency''' || Syntropy — toward order || Entropy — toward disorder
|-
| '''Energy''' || [[Spiral Energy]] || [[Argent Energy]]
|-
| '''Nature''' || Creative, constructive, expansive || Destructive, consumptive, contractive
|-
| '''Sound''' || /s/ (Quasi) || /z/ (Quazi)
|-
| '''Cosmic Forces''' || Core, Order, Omega-Flow || Void, Chaos, Alpha-Ebb
|-
| '''Beings''' || Angels, Archangels, Ascended Lifeforms || Demons, Devils, Infernal Lifeforms
|-
| '''Realm''' || [[Heaven|Heavens]] || [[Hell|Hells]]
|}

== Angelic Classification ==

Just as [[Demonology]] classifies 18 types of demonic influence, Angelology classifies 18 corresponding types of angelic force — each the '''constructive mirror''' of its demonic counterpart:

{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%;"
! # !! Angelic Force !! Domain !! Counters (Demonic Type)
|-
| 1 || '''Restorers of Vitality''' || Life force renewal, health restoration || Tormentors of Vitality
|-
| 2 || '''Soul Illuminators''' || Clarity of purpose, soul alignment || Soul Confounders
|-
| 3 || '''Peace Bringers''' || Harmony, conflict resolution, calm || Unrest Sowers
|-
| 4 || '''Mind Guardians''' || Mental clarity, psychic protection || Mind Invaders
|-
| 5 || '''Self Fortifiers''' || Identity strength, ego integrity || Erosion of Self
|-
| 6 || '''Purifiers''' || Cleansing corruption, restoring purity || Silent Corruptors
|-
| 7 || '''Flow Openers''' || Removing blockages, enabling progress || Blockers of Flow
|-
| 8 || '''Life Force Amplifiers''' || Vitality boost, energy replenishment || Life Force Siphoners
|-
| 9 || '''Emotional Harmonizers''' || Emotional balance, empathic healing || Emotional Distorters
|-
| 10 || '''Energy Wellsprings''' || Energy generation, abundant power || Energy Drainers
|-
| 11 || '''Liberation Bearers''' || Freedom of movement, breaking paralysis || Paralysis Bearers
|-
| 12 || '''Boundary Sanctifiers''' || Skin/aura integrity, boundary defense || Skin Invaders
|-
| 13 || '''Resilience Weavers''' || Strengthening defenses, adaptive resistance || Wearers of Resistance
|-
| 14 || '''Clarity Bearers''' || Dispelling confusion, truth revelation || Confusion Spreaders
|-
| 15 || '''Trust Builders''' || Restoring faith, building connection || Poisoners of Trust
|-
| 16 || '''Calm Anchors''' || Anger dissolution, serenity grounding || Anger Manifestors
|-
| 17 || '''Life Catalysts''' || Growth stimulation, birth/renewal || Life Inhibitors
|-
| 18 || '''Form Perfectors''' || Restoring true form, beauty, integrity || Surface Distorters
|}

== The Angelic Hierarchy ==

Angelic entities exist at multiple scales of the [[Cosmic Forces]] hierarchy:

{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%;"
! Tier !! Entity Type !! Scale !! Domain
|-
| 1 || '''Guardian Spirits''' || Personal || Individual protection and guidance
|-
| 2 || '''Angels''' || Community || Collective harmony and coordination
|-
| 3 || '''Archangels''' || Planetary || World-scale constructive forces
|-
| 4 || '''Ascended Lifeforms''' || Stellar / Galactic || Cosmic-scale syntropy maintenance
|-
| 5 || '''Omni-Angelic''' || Universal+ || [[Cosmic Forces|Super Cosmic Force]] (Omni) alignment
|}

== Connection to Arkana ==

{{main|Arkana}}
The [[Arkana]] tradition explicitly identifies its subject as the '''Language of the Angels''' — the [[Universal Language]] as used by angelic entities. This is not metaphorical:

* Angels communicate through UL because UL IS the language of creation
* [[Arkana Magic]] is the practice of learning to use UL as angels do — through study and formalization
* The [[Cosmic Cypher Scroll]] is written in angelic-tier UL — [[Quantum Printing]] with [[Psionic Ink]]

== Connection to Spiral Energy ==

{{main|Spiral Energy}}
[[Spiral Energy]] is the physical manifestation of Æther — the actual energy that angelic forces channel. Where [[Argent Energy]] (Nether) drives entropy, Spiral Energy drives:

* Evolution and growth
* Increasing complexity and consciousness
* The upward arc of civilizational development
* The [[Awakening Process]] predicted by [[Project Looking Glass]]

== In-Game Applications ==

* '''[[Defense Against the Dark Arts]]''' — Angelology provides the knowledge base for countering demonic attacks
* '''[[Psi Ward]]''' — Defensive technology based on angelic boundary principles
* '''[[Psi Harmonizer]]''' — Restoration technology drawing on angelic healing patterns
* '''Elemental combat''' — Æther-polarity attacks use constructive force (see [[Elemental Balance System]])
* '''[[Karma System]]''' — High-karma players have stronger affinity with angelic forces

== See Also ==

* [[Demonology]] — Study of Nether-aligned forces (counterpart)
* [[Æther]] — The constructive polarity
* [[Nether]] — The destructive polarity
* [[Spiral Energy]] — Physical manifestation of Æther
* [[Argent Energy]] — Physical manifestation of Nether
* [[Cosmic Forces]] — The underlying force system
* [[Elemental Balance System]] — Combat application of polarity
* [[Arkana]] — The "Language of the Angels" tradition
* [[Magic]] — The practice system

[[Category:Magic]]
[[Category:Cosmic Forces]]
[[Category:Angelology]]

title: Angels

{| class="wikitable"
|-
| [[Angel]] || [[Angels]] || [[Ascended Lifeforms]] || [[Holy]]([[Good]]) - [[Heaven]]( [[Heavens]] ) || [[Bright]]( [[Light]] ) - [[Æther]]
|-
| [[Demon]] || [[Demons]] || [[Infernal Lifeforms]] || [[Evil]]([[Bad]]) - [[Hell]]( [[Hells]] ) || [[Dark]]( [[Shadow]] ) - [[Nether]]

== List of Angels ==
